content_gaps: The SERPs are dominated by mass-market brands (Pandora) or traditional jewelers (Shreve & Co.) focusing on classic symbols like hearts and infinity signs, with little to no mention of deeper, pagan, or solstice-related symbolism.
There is a significant lack of content connecting jewelry to the emotional and symbolic weight of the winter season (darkness, renewal, introspection) which is a core part of the brief's anchor.
The concept of a "talisman" is almost exclusively found on Etsy or in very generic listicles, without exploring the specific protective or intentional qualities a handcrafted piece can hold.
"Handcrafted" in the SERPs often leads to Etsy category pages or low-quality gift roundups, not to individual artisans explaining their process or the meaning embedded in their work.
Most pages focus on generic Christmas themes (snowflakes, trees) rather than unique, artistic interpretations of winter, nature, or mythology that would align with a brand like Moon Raven Designs.
